title: Research items auto-complete without manual approval

steps.description: Backend: research-specific state machine transitions, reject approve/unapprove on research, auto-complete research work item on doc-update, reject research from batch-create, update iw-research skill docs
Code review: S01 (state machine + CLI + skill)
Frontend: hide approve/unapprove UI for research on dashboard; exclude research from batch-queue list query + template; reject approve/unapprove routes for research

Tests: update existing research-flow tests; add unit tests (state machine, validators) and integration tests (end-to-end research flow, approve/unapprove rejection, doc-update auto-complete, batch-create rejection, dashboard filter)
Code review: S05 (test coverage vs. AC)
Final cross-agent review: backend/frontend/tests integration, AC coverage, no regressions to non-research workflows
Fix CRITICAL and HIGH findings from S07
QV: Browser verification — research item detail page hides approve/unapprove, research item absent from batch-queue list, iw doc-update auto-completes research item visible on dashboard
